name: Annie Skullgirl
description:
A relaxing cup of coffee after a day at work

Annie of the Stars also known simply as Annie is the protagonist of her children's program Annie of the Stars but she hides a secret

(video game: skullgirl)

(I haven't made a skullgirl character for a while and I didn't know which one to make, in the end I decided to leave it to luck)
